_comment: Investigate OpenRC's bogus SIGCHLD handler address (0xa000411f1). Break at the kernel's rt_sigaction handler when signum==17 (SIGCHLD) and dump the raw struct sigaction from user memory.

steps.name: catch_sigchld_sigaction
steps._comment: Break at call x64_handle_syscall — check if syscall is rt_sigaction(SIGCHLD)
